summary: Iteration 6 - Payment System Testing Complete. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing completed for /auth, /subscription, /admin pages. Full flow verified: registration -> login -> subscription plans display -> admin dashboard with QR code generation.

issues: Only Apple button visible on landing page initially, Google button appears on /auth page - this is by design

critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.py properly implements 3-tier payment system with session-based auth
Lifetime codes use correct format LATENCE-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX with QR code generation
Admin endpoints properly protected with token verification
Subscription plans return correct prices: Essentiel 4.99€, Premium 14.99€
Stripe checkout integration configured via emergentintegrations

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users and lifetime codes created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me, /api/subscription/plans, /api/subscription/activate-lifetime, /api/admin/login, /api/admin/stats, /api/admin/generate-codes, /api/admin/codes all working. Frontend pages /auth, /subscription, /admin all functional with proper theming.

Auth Page /auth.details: Login form (email/password), registration form (name/email/password), Google OAuth button, Apple Sign-In button, guest mode - all present and functional

Subscription Page /subscription.details: Displays Essentiel (4.99€/mois) and Premium (14.99€/mois) plans with features list, 'Accès à Vie' section expands to show code input field

Admin Page /admin.details: Password login works with latence_admin_2024, dashboard shows user stats (11 users, 0€ revenue), user distribution by tier, lifetime codes (14 total, 2 used, 12 available), code generation with QR codes

API /api/auth/register.details: Creates user account, returns session token via cookie, validates duplicate emails

API /api/auth/login.details: Authenticates with email/password, returns session, rejects invalid credentials

API /api/subscription/plans.details: Returns 2 plans with correct prices and features

API /api/admin/stats.details: Protected endpoint, returns user counts, revenue, code stats

API /api/admin/generate-codes.details: Protected endpoint, generates LATENCE-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX codes with base64 QR images

Lifetime Code Flow.details: Full flow tested: admin generates code -> user registers -> user activates code -> user upgraded to lifetime tier with is_founder=true

Code Reuse Prevention.details: Used codes correctly rejected with 'déjà été utilisé' error

stripe_integration_note: Stripe checkout uses emergentintegrations library with sk_test_emergent key. Create-checkout endpoint returns checkout_url when properly authenticated.
